title: Essent Group Ltd. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results and Declares Quarterly Dividend
author: Na
description: Essent Group Ltd. announced its first quarter 2026 financial results and declared a quarterly dividend to shareholders. The announcement reflects the company's ongoing operations and capital return strategy.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article only announces Q1 2026 results and a dividend declaration without providing specific financial metrics, performance details, or forward guidance. The dividend declaration is a standard corporate action. Without substantive performance data or commentary, a neutral sentiment is appropriate.

title: Essent Group Posts $195 Million Profit
author: Na
description: Essent Group reported strong Q2 2025 financial results with $195 million net income, robust capital returns, and technology-driven credit pricing. The company demonstrated resilient mortgage insurance portfolio and confidence in long-term growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong financial performance with $195 million net income, 3% insurance in force growth, disciplined capital deployment, technology-enabled pricing strategy, and robust portfolio credit quality
